trainers.title: Сложение и вычитание отрицательных чисел на прямой
trainers.notes: Existing full board mirror trainer; accepts seed from URL.

trainers.title: Простые уравнения
trainers.notes: Pilot board mirror: current task, chosen operation, answer, feedback and visible step are mirrored.

trainers.title: Округление чисел
trainers.notes: Pilot board mirror: task, current step, selected digits, answer and feedback are mirrored.

trainers.title: Деление уголком
trainers.notes: Pilot board mirror: current dividend/divisor, quotient progress, highlighted block, written steps and answer are mirrored.

trainers.title: Линейные неравенства
trainers.notes: Pilot board mirror: current fixed task, solution step, answer fields, number-line result and feedback are mirrored.

trainers.title: ОГЭ задание 6: дроби
trainers.notes: Good future candidate, but current state spans bank index, attempts and reveal flags.

trainers.title: ОГЭ задание 7: числовая прямая
trainers.notes: Large catalog trainer; safe to open in board, risky to mirror without a separate focused pass.

trainers.title: ОГЭ задание 8: степени и корни
trainers.notes: Large task bank with internal state; keep as opens-in-board for this PR.

trainers.title: ОГЭ задание 9: уравнения
trainers.notes: Very large trainer with many modes and generated tasks; risky to touch in the first compatibility pass.

trainers.title: Кредитная таблица платежей
trainers.notes: Uses localStorage progress and a richer table state; audit before mirroring.

trainers.title: Финансовые задачи: нестандартные
trainers.notes: Large real trainer with localStorage; keep read-only/open-only until a dedicated state adapter pass.
